pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.1 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 8 settings on a Java 21 JDK or vice-versa causes version mismatches; Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17+.
